{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Development Executive",
  "description": "Awake to Power Communications - We empower Corps Members with digital skills and connect them with opportunities, enabling them to monetize their skills and thrive.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Business Development Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Job Type:&nbsp;Full-time
Job Field:&nbsp;Sales &amp; Business Development

Role Overview


	The Business Development Executive will be responsible for identifying, developing, and securing new business opportunities to drive revenue growth and expand market share.
	Unlike a traditional sales role, this position focuses heavily on strategic partnerships, long-term client acquisition, and market entry initiatives within the interior design, construction, and real estate sectors.
	The ideal candidate is a proactive deal-maker with strong relationship-building skills, commercial acumen, and the ability to identify untapped opportunities in both residential and commercial segments.


Key Responsibilities
Strategic Business Development:


	Identify and penetrate new market segments including luxury real estate developers, hospitality groups, corporate offices, and high-net-worth individuals.
	Develop and execute a structured business development plan aligned with the company&rsquo;s revenue and growth objectives.
	Lead negotiations for bulk supply agreements, project-based contracts, and exclusive partnerships.
	Monitor industry trends, competitor movements, and emerging opportunities to stay ahead of the market.


Partnership &amp; Account Management:


	Build and nurture long-term relationships with architects, interior designers, contractors, and procurement firms.
	Establish a formal referral and commission structure for strategic partners.
	Manage key accounts with high revenue potential, ensuring repeat business and client loyalty.
	Represent the company at industry expos, trade fairs, and networking events.


Lead Generation &amp; Pipeline Management:


	Proactively source leads through research, cold outreach, networking, and digital channels.
	Qualify leads based on project size, budget, and alignment with company offerings.
	Maintain a robust sales pipeline and provide regular forecasts to management.
	Convert qualified leads into closed deals through consultative selling and tailored proposals.


Proposal &amp; Contract Management:


	Prepare and present detailed proposals, project quotations, and commercial bids.
	Negotiate pricing, payment terms, and delivery schedules while protecting margin targets.
	Ensure all contracts and agreements are documented and compliant with company policies.


Cross-functional Collaboration:


	Work closely with the Sales &amp; Marketing Specialist to align business development efforts with digital campaigns and brand messaging.
	Coordinate with inventory and logistics teams to ensure product availability for large-scale projects.
	Provide market feedback to management regarding pricing, product demand, and competitive intelligence.


Performance Tracking &amp; Reporting:


	Track all business development activities, conversion rates, and revenue contributions.
	Prepare weekly and monthly reports on pipeline status, partnership growth, and market feedback.
	Use data to refine targeting strategies and improve close rates.


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Economics, or a related field.
	3&ndash;5 years of experience in business development, key account management, or B2B sales, preferably within interior solutions, construction materials, real estate, or luxury goods.
	Proven track record of securing high-value contracts and building strategic partnerships.
	Strong understanding of the Lagos real estate and interior design ecosystem is highly desirable.
	Excellent negotiation, proposal writing, and presentation skills.
	Self-starter with the ability to work independently and meet aggressive targets.
	Proficiency in CRM tools, Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word), and LinkedIn Sales Navigator.


Core Competencies


	Strategic opportunity identification
	Relationship building and stakeholder management
	Persuasive negotiation and closing skills
	Commercial and financial acumen
	Resilience and target-driven mindset
	High integrity and professional discretion.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV/Resume to:&nbsp;careers@awaketopowercom.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-28",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-29",

Business Development Executive Job at Awake to Power Communications




        
    

        
        Awake to Power Communications - We empower Corps Members with digital skills and connect them with opportunities, enabling them to monetize their skills and thrive.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Executive

Job Location: Lagos
Job Type: Full-time
Job Field: Sales & Business Development

Role Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Business Development Executive will be responsible for identifying, developing, and securing new business opportunities to drive revenue growth and expand market share.
	Unlike a traditional sales role, this position focuses heavily on strategic partnerships, long-term client acquisition, and market entry initiatives within the interior design, construction, and real estate sectors.
	The ideal candidate is a proactive deal-maker with strong relationship-building skills, commercial acumen, and the ability to identify untapped opportunities in both residential and commercial segments.


Key Responsibilities
Strategic Business Development:


	Identify and penetrate new market segments including luxury real estate developers, hospitality groups, corporate offices, and high-net-worth individuals.
	Develop and execute a structured business development plan aligned with the company’s revenue and growth objectives.
	Lead negotiations for bulk supply agreements, project-based contracts, and exclusive partnerships.
	Monitor industry trends, competitor movements, and emerging opportunities to stay ahead of the market.


Partnership & Account Management:


	Build and nurture long-term relationships with architects, interior designers, contractors, and procurement firms.
	Establish a formal referral and commission structure for strategic partners.
	Manage key accounts with high revenue potential, ensuring repeat business and client loyalty.
	Represent the company at industry expos, trade fairs, and networking events.


Lead Generation & Pipeline Management:


	Proactively source leads through research, cold outreach, networking, and digital channels.
	Qualify leads based on project size, budget, and alignment with company offerings.
	Maintain a robust sales pipeline and provide regular forecasts to management.
	Convert qualified leads into closed deals through consultative selling and tailored proposals.


Proposal & Contract Management:


	Prepare and present detailed proposals, project quotations, and commercial bids.
	Negotiate pricing, payment terms, and delivery schedules while protecting margin targets.
	Ensure all contracts and agreements are documented and compliant with company policies.


Cross-functional Collaboration:


	Work closely with the Sales & Marketing Specialist to align business development efforts with digital campaigns and brand messaging.
	Coordinate with inventory and logistics teams to ensure product availability for large-scale projects.
	Provide market feedback to management regarding pricing, product demand, and competitive intelligence.


Performance Tracking & Reporting:


	Track all business development activities, conversion rates, and revenue contributions.
	Prepare weekly and monthly reports on pipeline status, partnership growth, and market feedback.
	Use data to refine targeting strategies and improve close rates.


Qualifications & Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Economics, or a related field.
	3–5 years of experience in business development, key account management, or B2B sales, preferably within interior solutions, construction materials, real estate, or luxury goods.
	Proven track record of securing high-value contracts and building strategic partnerships.
	Strong understanding of the Lagos real estate and interior design ecosystem is highly desirable.
	Excellent negotiation, proposal writing, and presentation skills.
	Self-starter with the ability to work independently and meet aggressive targets.
	Proficiency in CRM tools, Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word), and LinkedIn Sales Navigator.


Core Competencies


	Strategic opportunity identification
	Relationship building and stakeholder management
	Persuasive negotiation and closing skills
	Commercial and financial acumen
	Resilience and target-driven mindset
	High integrity and professional discretion.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV/Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Finance Officer",
  "description": "Polaris Digitech Limited is a&nbsp;location intelligence firm that specializes in providing data, software and decision support services to fulfill its client&rsquo;s strategies and management needs through the development and deployment of Geographic Information Systems (GIS).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja,&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type:Full-time
Reports To: Finance Manager

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Finance Officer with 3&ndash;4 years of relevant experience to support financial operations and ensure compliance with statutory requirements.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, managing reconciliations, and supporting day-to-day finance activities.


Key Responsibilities


	Raise requests for verification-related payments for approval and post related transactions.
	Process verification-related payments in a timely manner
	Handle banking transactions for operational activities
	Prepare and file VAT, WHT, and other statutory returns accurately and within deadlines
	Maintain and update the fixed assets register on a monthly basis, applying appropriate depreciation rates.
	Prepare bank reconciliation statements and investigate discrepancies.
	Perform general ledger reconciliations and resolve variances
	Carry out any other duties as assigned by the Finance Manager.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.
	3 - 4 years of relevant work experience in a similar finance or accounting role.
	Good knowledge of financial reporting and statutory compliance (VAT, WHT, etc.).
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, especially Excel.
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy.
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.


Organizational Competencies:


	Strong oral and written communication skills.
	Good organizational awareness and industry knowledge.
	Effective time management skills.


Functional Competencies:


	High level of service excellence.
	Strong interpersonal skills.
	Good telephone etiquette.
	Solid understanding of finance operations.


Corporate Culture Fit:


	Innovative and creative mindset
	High level of integrity
	Strong sense of ownership and accountability.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@polarisdigitech.net&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Finance Officer Job at Polaris Digitech Limited




        
    

        
        Polaris Digitech Limited is a location intelligence firm that specializes in providing data, software and decision support services to fulfill its client’s strategies and management needs through the development and deployment of Geographic Information Systems (GIS).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Officer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type:Full-time
Reports To: Finance Manager

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Finance Officer with 3–4 years of relevant experience to support financial operations and ensure compliance with statutory requirements.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, managing reconciliations, and supporting day-to-day finance activities.


Key Responsibilities


	Raise requests for verification-related payments for approval and post related transactions.
	Process verification-related payments in a timely manner
	Handle banking transactions for operational activities
	Prepare and file VAT, WHT, and other statutory returns accurately and within deadlines
	Maintain and update the fixed assets register on a monthly basis, applying appropriate depreciation rates.
	Prepare bank reconciliation statements and investigate discrepancies.
	Perform general ledger reconciliations and resolve variances
	Carry out any other duties as assigned by the Finance Manager.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.
	3 - 4 years of relevant work experience in a similar finance or accounting role.
	Good knowledge of financial reporting and statutory compliance (VAT, WHT, etc.).
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, especially Excel.
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy.
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.


Organizational Competencies:


	Strong oral and written communication skills.
	Good organizational awareness and industry knowledge.
	Effective time management skills.


Functional Competencies:


	High level of service excellence.
	Strong interpersonal skills.
	Good telephone etiquette.
	Solid understanding of finance operations.


Corporate Culture Fit:


	Innovative and creative mindset
	High level of integrity
	Strong sense of ownership and accountability.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Professional Graphic Designer",
  "description": "Havana Group has a number of companies under its porfolio. We&#39;re into real estate, media, technology and hospitality. You will enjoy working with us if you&#39;re a talented young, vibrant, energetic, creativeand ambitious individual who wants to work with a team of other champions, in an environment that sponsors growth and development. If you&#39;re not intimidated with greatness, you&#39;re welcome to join our team.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Professional Graphic Designer

Job Location:&nbsp;Enugu
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Lead the creation of visual concepts for marketing materials, social media, websites, and other digital and print platforms.
	Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to develop design solutions that align with brand identity and project objectives.
	Design and oversee high-quality graphics, illustrations, and layouts for advertisements, brochures, flyers, banners, and other promotional materials.
	Ensure consistent application of brand guidelines across all creative outputs and update guidelines when necessary.
	Review and prepare final design files for print and digital use, ensuring accuracy in formatting, color, and resolution.
	Provide creative direction and mentorship to junior designers, including reviewing work and offering constructive feedback.
	Manage multiple design projects simultaneously while meeting tight deadlines and maintaining quality standards.
	Interpret and implement feedback from management and stakeholders to refine and improve designs.
	Support the development of creative concepts for campaigns, client presentations, and internal projects.
	Stay up to date with industry trends, design tools, and best practices to keep the company&rsquo;s visual assets fresh and competitive.


Requirements


	Proven experience as a graphic designer or in a similar design leadership role.
	Advanced proficiency in design tools such as Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign).
	Strong understanding of typography, colour theory, layout design, and visual hierarchy.
	Excellent portfolio demonstrating a wide range of high-quality design projects and creative leadership.
	Ability to work collaboratively in a fast-paced environment while managing multiple projects and priorities.
	Strong communication skills, including the ability to present and defend creative ideas.
	Exceptional attention to detail and a strong commitment to high-quality design output.
	Excellent time management and organisational skills with a proven ability to meet deadlines.


Additional Skill (advantage):


	Bachelor&rsquo;sDegree in Graphic Design or Visual Arts.
	Working knowledge of web design principles (HTML/CSS) is an added advantage.
	Experience with video editing, motion graphics, or animation tools is a plus.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates are invited to submit their CV to:&nbsp;hrsupport@9figuremedia.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of&nbsp;the email.",

Professional Graphic Designer Job at Havana Group




        
    

        
        Havana Group has a number of companies under its porfolio. We're into real estate, media, technology and hospitality. You will enjoy working with us if you're a talented young, vibrant, energetic, creativeand ambitious individual who wants to work with a team of other champions, in an environment that sponsors growth and development. If you're not intimidated with greatness, you're welcome to join our team.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Professional Graphic Designer

Job Location: Enugu
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Lead the creation of visual concepts for marketing materials, social media, websites, and other digital and print platforms.
	Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to develop design solutions that align with brand identity and project objectives.
	Design and oversee high-quality graphics, illustrations, and layouts for advertisements, brochures, flyers, banners, and other promotional materials.
	Ensure consistent application of brand guidelines across all creative outputs and update guidelines when necessary.
	Review and prepare final design files for print and digital use, ensuring accuracy in formatting, color, and resolution.
	Provide creative direction and mentorship to junior designers, including reviewing work and offering constructive feedback.
	Manage multiple design projects simultaneously while meeting tight deadlines and maintaining quality standards.
	Interpret and implement feedback from management and stakeholders to refine and improve designs.
	Support the development of creative concepts for campaigns, client presentations, and internal projects.
	Stay up to date with industry trends, design tools, and best practices to keep the company’s visual assets fresh and competitive.


Requirements


	Proven experience as a graphic designer or in a similar design leadership role.
	Advanced proficiency in design tools such as Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign).
	Strong understanding of typography, colour theory, layout design, and visual hierarchy.
	Excellent portfolio demonstrating a wide range of high-quality design projects and creative leadership.
	Ability to work collaboratively in a fast-paced environment while managing multiple projects and priorities.
	Strong communication skills, including the ability to present and defend creative ideas.
	Exceptional attention to detail and a strong commitment to high-quality design output.
	Excellent time management and organisational skills with a proven ability to meet deadlines.


Additional Skill (advantage):


	Bachelor’sDegree in Graphic Design or Visual Arts.
	Working knowledge of web design principles (HTML/CSS) is an added advantage.
	Experience with video editing, motion graphics, or animation tools is a plus.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates are invited to submit their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

title: Job Vacancies at Koolboks
content:
Koolboks makes refrigeration accessible and affordable to all. Our solar-powered freezers, equipped with Pay-As-You-Go technology and offered through an innovative Cooling-as-a-Service model, enable eco-friendly and accessible refrigeration to everyone who needs it. Life is kool!

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Field Sales Representative

Job Location: Lagos  
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Conduct field sales activities.
	Identify and engage potential customers.
	Promote products/services effectively.
	Achieve set sales targets.
	Report feedback to supervisors.


Salary
N120,000 - N135,000 monthly.

Application Closing Date: 12th May, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

2.) IOT Engineer

Job Location: Igando, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented IoT Engineer to support the development and implementation of IoT-based solutions in solar energy systems.
	The ideal candidate will support with system integration, data analysis, and software development, playing a key role in improving the efficiency and performance of solar infrastructure through IoT technologies.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in the design and development of IoT-enabled solutions for solar energy systems.
	Support the integration of sensors and data acquisition components with solar panels, inverters, and related hardware.
	Conduct performance monitoring and data analysis to identify trends, anomalies, and opportunities for optimization.
	Collaborate with the engineering team to troubleshoot and resolve technical challenges.
	Assist in developing software tools for real-time data visualization, reporting, and system diagnostics.
	Participate in on-site testing, deployment, and validation of IoT devices and systems.
	Stay informed on the latest advancements in IoT and renewable energy technologies to contribute innovative ideas.


Qualifications


	BSc or HND in Electrical Engineering, Electronics, Computer Engineering, or a related field.
	Foundational understanding of solar energy systems and IoT technologies.
	Basic proficiency in programming languages such as Python or C++.
	Familiarity with communication protocols such as MQTT, HTTP, or similar.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a multidisciplinary team.
	Effective written and verbal communication skills.


Preferred Skills:


	Prior internship or project experience related to solar energy or IoT.
	Exposure to cloud computing platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure) and data storage systems.
	Understanding of network configuration and cybersecurity protocols in IoT environments.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 per month.

Application Closing Date: 30th April, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

3.) Telesales Executive

Job Location: Gbagada, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Details


	Call and engage customers to promote Koolboks products, explain offerings, handle inquiries, and close sales.
	Accurately record interactions, process orders, generate leads, and manage accounts to drive satisfaction and retention.
	Maintain strong product knowledge, use sales scripts effectively, meet targets, and support overall business growth.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with at least 2 years of experience.


Salary
N120,000 - N135,000 / Month.

Application Closing Date: 7th May, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Finance Manager",
  "description": "DM Holdings (DMH) is a conglomerate of companies with vast interests in Entertainment and Media business. With each of the subsidiaries&rsquo; enviable track record, DMH is poised to take a strategic position in providing cutting edge services within the Media/Marketing Communication landscape.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Ogba-Ojodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements in compliance with IFRS and relevant accounting standards.
	Conduct variance analysis and prepare financial reports for management review.
	Monitor financial performance and advise on improvement areas.
	Coordinate the preparation of annual budgets and periodic forecasts.
	Track budget performance and highlight variances for management action.
	Oversee day-to-day accounting functions including accounts payable, accounts receivable, general ledger, and bank reconciliations.
	Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records.
	Ensure proper documentation and classification of all transactions.
	Ensure tax compliance including VAT, PAYE, and corporate tax filings.
	Liaise with external auditors and prepare audit schedules and supporting documents.
	Implement and enforce financial policies, internal controls, and procedures
	Manage cash flow to ensure adequate liquidity for operations.
	Monitor bank transactions, reconcile accounts, and manage relationships with financial institutions.
	Provide financial insights to support business decisions.
	Evaluate investment opportunities, cost-saving initiatives, and financial risks


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.
	3&ndash;5 years of relevant experience in accounting or finance.
	Strong knowledge of IFRS and tax regulations.
	Proficiency in accounting software (e.g., Sage, QuickBooks, SAP, or other ERP systems).
	Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.
	High level of integrity and attention to detail.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidate should send their CV to:&nbsp;jobs@dmholdingslimited.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",
